score_evidence.accuracy: Timeline realistic for public_civic 2,000m² project: Phase 1 (8 weeks), Phase 2 (16 weeks — slightly above rubric range of 10-14 but justified for public project with government approval cycles), Phase 3 (10 weeks), Phase 4 (10 weeks), Phase 5 (8 weeks), Phase 6 (26 weeks — explicitly noted as longer than residential for public project). Total span: 2026-03-25 to 2027-09-29 = approximately 18 months, appropriate for public civic project. All dates ISO-8601. No dependency inversions. Score 5.

decision_commentary: Comprehensive project schedule. All 6 SOW phases present with full deliverables lists. Timeline is realistic for public civic context — Phase 2 at 16 weeks (vs SOW's 10-14 range) appropriately extended to accommodate government approval cycles. Phase 6 permitting at 26 weeks correctly reflects public project extended timeline. All 5 payment milestones mapped. Only deduction is simulated Asana state sync.
celia_routing_notes: No Marcela gate on Segment E per rubric. Pablo fires after activation confirmed. Routing is correct.
